# Chapter 14: Statistical inference  (~100 pp)
- 14.1 Estimation: point and interval (15)
- 14.2 Hypothesis testing as decision theory (15)
- 14.3 Likelihood and maximum likelihood (15)
- 14.4 Bayesian inference (15)
- 14.5 Regression: linear, logistic, regularised (15)
- 14.6 Cross-validation, hold-out, the danger of looking at test data (12)
- 14.7 Failure section: p-hacking, multiple comparisons, the replication crisis revisited (13)

**Archetype**: uncertainty, ethics (statistical malpractice). **Project**: fit a model to a real dataset; report properly with cross-validated error bars. **Exercises**: 40.
